response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong focus on cloud-native development, AI-agent infrastructure, and full-stack systems, but lacks demonstrated leadership at the director level, entrepreneurial experience, or formal AI-focused products. His background in AI is limited to recent work in AI-agent frameworks, which may not suffice for the role's strategic AI focus.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience across diverse stacks
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work aligns with evolving tech trends
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic leadership or team scaling
Limited formal AI expertise or recognized AI product development
Entrepreneurial experience is limited to an open-source platform, not a commercial venture

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and strategic product experience
